name: Classic Shakshuka
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 10-15 minutes

ingredients.item: chili pepper, cored, seeded, and diced

method: Heat the olive oil in a large, deep non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, chili pepper, and garlic. Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring continuously.
Stir in the diced tomatoes and water. Season with salt and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
Crack the eggs on top of the tomato sauce.
Cover and cook until eggs are done, about 5 minutes.
